query: Review this pull request for correctness and security. Report findings only.
Look over my uncommitted diff and identify any blocking bugs.
Audit this database migration patch for data loss and rollback risks.
Review the implementation of this architecture decision for reliability gaps.
Can you inspect this concurrency fix and tell me whether a race still exists?
Perform a code review of the authentication changes and rank findings by severity.
Check this dependency upgrade patch for compatibility and operational regressions.
Review this API change for breaking contracts and missing tests.
Find concrete defects in this patch; skip style comments.
Assess this rollout configuration change for production risks without editing it.
Fix every issue in this pull request and update the tests.
Design a replacement architecture for the notification service.
Implement the account deletion endpoint.
Explain what this function does.
Summarize the pull request description.
Write tests for this already-understood bug.
Refactor this module to remove duplication.
Create an ADR for our caching strategy.
Resolve the merge conflicts in this branch.
What does the CI failure mean and how should I fix it?
